CheckTitle: Linode Cloud Firewall is assigned to devices
Description: Linode Cloud Firewalls are checked to verify they are attached to at least one device.
Risk: Unassigned firewalls do not provide protection to running workloads and can indicate a misconfigured security control.

Code.Other:
1. Log in to the Linode Cloud Manager
2. Navigate to Firewalls
3. Select the associated firewall
4. Click on either the Linodes or Nodebalancers tab and add those devices to the firewall

Recommendation.Text: Attach firewalls to applicable Linode devices to enforce intended network controls.
